name: Zhejiang Qianjiang Motorcycle Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Qianjiang Motorcycle Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of motorcycles, engines, and components in China and internationally. The company also offers racing cars and scooters. It provides its products under the Qianjiang Motorcycle, Benelli, Keeway, and KSR brands. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Wenling, China.
